news.headline: Aptiv (NYSE: APTV) to announce Q4 2024 results on Feb 6, 2025. Investor call at 8:00 am EST. Hosted by CEO and CFO. Webcast link at ir.aptiv.com.
news.summary: Aptiv PLC, a company listed on NYSE as APTV, is set to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024 on February 6, 2025. An investor call is scheduled for the same day at 8:00 a.m. EST, featuring Chairman and CEO Kevin Clark, along with CFO Varun Laroyia. The event can be accessed through a live webcast and presentation materials on the Aptiv Investor Relations website at ir.aptiv.com. This communication was released from Schaffhausen, Switzerland.

news.headline: Revelyst acquisition by SVP funds in Providence and Greenwich is now complete per Business Wire statement.
news.summary: A recent acquisition was finalized as Strategic Value Partners (SVP) completed the acquisition of Revelyst, a company based in Providence, R.I. and Greenwich, Conn. SVP, a leading investment firm, managed funds for the transaction. The acquisition was publicly announced earlier and has now been successfully completed, marking a significant milestone. The details of the acquisition, including financial figures and terms of the deal, were not disclosed in the announcement.

news.headline: MicroStrategy aims to raise $2 billion through public offerings for capital plan to gather $21 billion equities and fixed income instruments.
news.summary: MicroStrategy Incorporated, based in Tysons Corner, VA, is pursuing its 21/21 Plan, aiming to secure $21 billion in equity and $21 billion in fixed income instruments within three years. As part of this plan, the company is looking to raise up to $2 billion through public underwritten offerings of perpetual preferred stock. This move comes as MicroStrategy continues its strategic financial initiatives. MicroStrategy is listed on Nasdaq as MSTR.

news.headline: Pearl Diver Credit Co. declares $0.2389 monthly dividends on 8.00% Series A Term Preferred Stock Due 2029.
news.summary: In a joint announcement on January 3, 2025, Pearl Diver Credit Company Inc. unveiled its latest dividend update. The Board of Directors approved a monthly dividend for shareholders of the 8.00% Series A Term Preferred Stock Due 2029. The dividend amount set per share is $0.2389. The Company's shares are included in the NYSE under the ticker symbols PDCC and PDPA.

news.headline: Iveco Group transfers ownership of MAGIRUS to Mutares, subject to agreement terms outlined in 2024, reflecting 2024 business performance.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, Iveco Group N.V. (EXM: IVG) disclosed the transfer of full ownership of Magirus GmbH and its firefighting business affiliates to Mutares SE & Co. KGaA. This move is in accordance with the agreement outlined on March 13, 2024. The transfer is subject to contractual price adjustments mainly based on MAGIRUS's business performance in 2024. The acquiring company, Mutares SE & Co. KGaA (ISIN: DE000A2NB650), will now take over the operations previously held by Iveco Group N.V.

news.headline: Creative Realities' CFO, Will Logan, resigns to join Rough Country, effective January 31st, 2025. He will serve as a Strategic Advisor to CRI till end of 2025.
news.summary: Louisville, Kentucky, January 3, 2025 - Creative Realities, Inc. (NASDAQ: CREX), a top provider of digital signage and media solutions, shared news of Will Logan stepping down as Chief Financial Officer, with his resignation effective from January 31, 2025. Logan will assume the role of Chief Financial Officer at Rough Country, renowned in the truck, Jeep, and UTV enthusiast market for its performance-enhancing products and suspension systems. While taking on his new role, Logan will also act as a Strategic Advisor to Creative Realities, Inc. until at least the conclusion of 2025. The Company looks forward to maintaining its growth momentum and advancing its successful business strategy under these changes.

news.headline: Business First Bancshares, Inc. (Nasdaq: BFST) to release Q4 2024 earnings on Jan. 23, 2025, with a conference call at 4:00 p.m. CDT.
news.summary: In Baton Rouge, Louisiana, on January 3, 2025, Business First Bancshares, Inc. (Nasdaq: BFST) revealed plans to unveil its Q4 2024 earnings post-market closure on January 23, 2025. This information pertains to the parent company of b1BANK. To delve deeper into these results, executive management will conduct a conference call and webcast on the same day, at 4:00 p.m. CDT.

news.headline: Brookfield Renewable to discuss Q4 2024 results in conference call on Jan 31, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. ET.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, Brookfield Renewable, a leading renewable energy company listed on NYSE (BEP, BEPC) and TSX (BEP.UN, BEPC), announced that they will be hosting their Fourth Quarter 2024 Conference Call and Webcast on January 31, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. ET. This event will focus on discussing the company’s financial results and upcoming business ventures.

news.headline: Brookfield Infrastructure to hold Q4 2024 conference call on Jan 30 at 9:00 a.m. (ET) - announced on Jan 3, 2025.
news.summary: Brookfield Infrastructure Partners has scheduled its fourth quarter 2024 conference call and webcast for Thursday, January 30, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time.

news.headline: Rakovina Therapeutics (TSX: RKV) to join industry leaders at 43rd J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conf Week in San Francisco Jan 13-16.
news.summary: Rakovina Therapeutics, Inc., a biopharmaceutical firm concentrating on crafting innovative cancer treatments utilizing unique DNA-damage response technologies, is excited to reveal its involvement in activities and gatherings coinciding with the 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference slated for January 13-16, 2025, in San Francisco. The company is listed on TSX under the symbol RKV.

news.headline: USCB Financial Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: USCB) to reveal Q4 2024 results on Jan 23, 2025 post-market close.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, USCB Financial Holdings, Inc. announced that they will be releasing their financial results for the quarter concluding on December 31, 2024, after the market closes on Thursday, January 23, 2025. The Company, listed as NASDAQ: USCB, will make this report public, providing stakeholders and investors with crucial insights into their performance during this period. This update signifies a significant event for the Company as they share key figures and data that will impact their standing in the market.

news.headline: Olema Oncology granted 26,200 stock options to 3 employees under Nasdaq rule, advancing breast cancer therapies.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, Olema Pharmaceuticals, Inc. revealed that they provided stock options to three fresh employees to buy a total of 26,200 shares of the company's common stock on January 2, 2025. These grants were sanctioned by the Compensation Committee of Olema’s Board of Directors and issued under the Company's 2022 Inducement Plan as a crucial inducement for the new hires joining Olema. Olema is recognized for its focus on developing targeted therapies for breast cancer and related conditions. The company, trading on Nasdaq under the symbol OLMA, is entrenched in the clinical-stage biopharmaceutical sector.

news.headline: ORIC Pharmaceuticals grants 16,400 stock options and 2,800 restricted stock units to new non-executive employee.
news.summary: On January 2, 2025, ORIC Pharmaceuticals, Inc., a company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol ORIC, located in South San Francisco and San Diego, disclosed that they provided 16,400 non-qualified stock options and 2,800 restricted stock units to a new non-executive employee who joined the company in December 2024. These grants were made as part of the employee's compensation package to aid in attracting and retaining talent within the organization. ORIC, which specializes in developing therapies targeting therapeutic resistance mechanisms in oncology, aims to enhance its workforce with skilled individuals in pursuit of its research and development goals.

news.headline: Assertio Holdings, Inc. granted its new Senior VP 62,500 RSUs and 275,000 stock options on Dec 23, 2024.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, in Lake Forest, Illinois, Assertio Holdings, Inc. revealed that Mary Pietryga, the new Senior Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer, was granted 62,500 restricted stock units (RSUs) and 275,000 stock options by the Compensation Committee of the Company’s Board of Directors on December 23, 2024. Assertio, traded as NASDAQ: ASRT, is a pharmaceutical firm known for providing unique products to patients through its robust commercial infrastructure. Mary Pietryga, aged 62, has received these incentives as part of her compensation package.

news.headline: Brookfield Business Partners organizing Q4 2024 Results Conference Call soon.
Fed bank term funding loans $4.41b in week ended January 1 after $5.78b.
Fed discount-window loans $3.23 bln in week ended january 1st after $2.06 bln.
NASA officials to host media call on Mars Sample Return Program update. Teleconference on Jan. 7 at 1 p.m. EST.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, in Washington, NASA Administrator Bill Nelson and Nicky Fox, the associate administrator of the Science Mission Directorate, will conduct a media teleconference on January 7 at 1 p.m. EST. The purpose is to present an update on NASA's Mars Sample Return Program. This event will shed light on the latest developments surrounding the program.

news.headline: ArcBest will announce Q4 2024 results on Jan 31, 2025. Conference call at 9:30am EST. Listen by calling (800) 715-9871. Conference ID: 7688695.
news.summary: Arkansas-based company ArcBest® (Nasdaq: ARCB) is set to reveal its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2024 on January 31, 2025, before the market opens. A conference call featuring company executives is scheduled for the same day at 9:30 a.m. EST (8:30 a.m. CST) to delve into the results. For those interested in tuning in, they can dial (800) 715-9871, using the conference ID 7688695. A recorded playback of the call will also be accessible until the end of February 1st.

news.headline: FCA US reports 1% increase in Q4 2024 retail sales vs. last year, and 4% increase in H2 2024 vs. H1. Total sales show 5% growth Q4 over Q3.
news.summary: In Auburn Hills, Michigan, on January 3, 2025, it was reported that a company's retail sales in the U.S. for the fourth quarter of 2024 saw a 1% increase compared to the same period in the previous year. Additionally, the company's retail sales in the second half of 2024 showed a 4% increase over the first half of that year. The total U.S. sales demonstrated a 5% growth from the third quarter to the fourth quarter of 2024. These positive trends were observed by FCA US, showcasing a steady uptick in sales for the company.

news.headline: Johnson wins Speaker vote as GOP prepares for trifecta, source says.
Forge Global (NYSE: FRGE) gets notice of non-compliance from NYSE due to share price below $1.00 average closing price.
news.summary: Forge Global Holdings, Inc., a top private securities marketplace traded under NYSE: FRGE, recently received notice from the NYSE on December 31, 2024, stating that the company is not meeting the standards outlined in Rule 802.01C of the NYSE’s Listed Company Manual. This rule specifies that a company's common stock must maintain a minimum average closing price of $1.00 over a continuous 30 trading day period. This development raises concerns regarding Forge's compliance with NYSE regulations.

news.headline: Fastenal Company (Nasdaq: FAST) to review 2024 annual and fourth-quarter earnings in conference call on Jan 17, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. Central Time.
news.summary: Winona, Minnesota-based Fastenal Company (Nasdaq:FAST) has set a date for its upcoming conference call to discuss the 2024 annual and fourth quarter results and provide updates on current operations. The call is scheduled to take place on Friday, January 17, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. central time. For those interested in tuning in, the conference call will be streamed live on the internet and can be accessed at the following web address: https://investor.fastenal.com/events.cfm.

news.headline: Baby stroller market to grow by $1.86 billion (2025-2029) due to lifestyle changes, rise in nuclear families, AI-driven tools.
news.summary: According to a recent report on the impact of AI on market trends, the global market for baby strollers and prams is projected to increase by approximately USD 1.86 billion between 2025 and 2029. The research conducted by Technavio suggests that the market is anticipated to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) exceeding 7% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: Santa rally ends, U.S. stocks see longest losing streak since April. Tesla misses delivery targets. 30-year treasury yield hits 4.8%. Bond investors cautious ahead of Trump's second term.
news.summary: At the beginning of the new year, the Santa Claus Rally bid adieu as the U.S. stock market faced a weak start to January, experiencing five consecutive days of losses. This negative streak marked the longest since April. As the countdown to Donald Trump's second presidential term inches closer, there is a prevailing sense of uncertainty among investors who eagerly anticipate clarifications on forthcoming policies that may have a significant impact on the American economy and beyond.Moreover, the bond market is indicating potential trouble ahead for the economy as Treasury yields surge. The 30-year yield has now reached 4.8%, marking its highest point in more than a year. The increasing yields are viewed as a warning sign of elevated borrowing expenses and the possibility of inflationary pressures looming. Investors are closely monitoring these developments for their implications on the market.

news.headline: E2open reschedules Q3 2025 results to Jan 10th due to National Day of Mourning for President Jimmy Carter. Earnings reported before market open.
news.summary: In Dallas, E2open Parent Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: ETWO), a leading connected supply chain SaaS platform with a vast multi-enterprise network, shared that it will unveil its fiscal third quarter 2025 financial results before the U.S. financial markets open on Friday, January 10, 2025. A conference call led by E2open management is set for 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to delve into the financial outcomes and key business updates. Initially planned for another date, the 845471 will now provide the relevant information on this new date.

news.headline: Cadence to announce Q4 & fiscal year 2024 results in webcast on February 18, 2025. $CDNS trading on Nasdaq.
news.summary: Cadence Design Systems, Inc., a company listed on Nasdaq under ticker symbol CDNS, is scheduled to host a webcast to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2024 on Tuesday, February 18, 2025. This event will provide investors and stakeholders with insights into the company's performance and key metrics. It is an important opportunity to track the financial health and strategic direction of Cadence Design Systems, Inc.

news.headline: Urbana Corp corrects Ex-Dividend Date to Jan 18, 2023, instead of previous Jan 12, 2023.
TeraWulf announced December 2024 update: Secured leases with Core42 for 70 MW data center, generating $1 billion revenue.
news.summary: Core42 has finalized leases for over 70 megawatts of digital infrastructure in a high-performance computing data center. This agreement guarantees a revenue of $1 billion during the initial 10-year term.

news.headline: Procaps Group (NASDAQ: PROC) receives delinquency letter from Nasdaq on December 31, 2024 for interim financial statements till June 30.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, Procaps Group, S.A. (NASDAQ: PROC), a key healthcare and pharmaceutical services firm in Latin America, revealed it received notification from Nasdaq on December 31, 2024. This notification pertained to a filing delay concerning the Company's interim financial statements for the period finishing on June 30, 2024.

news.headline: Horizon Bancorp to discuss Q4 & full-year 2024 results on a conference call on Jan 23.
news.summary: Horizon Bancorp, Inc. has scheduled a conference call on January 2nd to discuss their financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. This call will provide an opportunity to review the company's results, including key figures and important insights. Shareholders and analysts are encouraged to participate in order to gain a comprehensive understanding of Horizon Bancorp, Inc.'s performance during this period. The call aims to address any inquiries and present a detailed analysis of the financial data. Participants can expect to hear about revenue, earnings, assets, liabilities, and other significant metrics that reflect the company's operations in the specified timeframe.

news.headline: FutureFuel Corp. gets Excise Tax Registration approval by IRS to access clean fuel production tax credit. Capacity: 60M gallons biodiesel/year.
news.summary: FutureFuel Corp. (NYSE: FF), based in Clayton, Missouri, announced on January 3, 2025, that it has obtained Excise Tax Registration approval from the Internal Revenue Service. This approval marks the initial step for eligibility to claim the Internal Revenue Code 45Z credit, also referred to as the clean fuel production tax credit. The tax credit, sanctioned in August 2022 and operational from January 1, 2025, awaits further instructions from the IRS, which will provide comprehensive guidance to FutureFuel and other Renewable Fuel Producers. FutureFuel has the capacity to manufacture up to 60 million gallons of biodiesel annually.

news.headline: US bank deposits rose to $17.865 tln from $17.806 tln in prior week.

New study in ADLM's The Journal of Applied Laboratory Medicine shows a streamlined approach to testing for heparin-induced thrombocytopenia, improving diagnostic accuracy. Published in a special issue, the findings aim to advance healthcare value. Washington, Jan. 3, 2025.
news.summary: Research results were recently released in a dedicated edition of ADLM's publication, The Journal of Applied Laboratory Medicine, with the theme "Diagnostic stewardship in action: Advancing healthcare value." The study, conducted by the Association for Diagnostics & Laboratory Medicine (ADLM), was published on January 3, 2025, in Washington. This study presents valuable insights into healthcare practices to enhance efficiency and value. It offers crucial information on diagnostic stewardship, contributing to the advancement of the healthcare sector. The report sheds light on key aspects that are essential for improving healthcare outcomes and overall effectiveness.

news.headline: Special issue discussing diagnostic stewardship in healthcare collaboration released by ADLM's The Journal of Applied Laboratory Medicine.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, a report highlighted the significance of diagnostic stewardship in healthcare, emphasizing the importance of healthcare professionals collaborating to ensure patients receive appropriate clinical laboratory tests promptly. The report was issued by the Association for Diagnostics & Laboratory Medicine (ADLM). This collaboration aims to facilitate the delivery of accurate and timely medical assessments, improving patient care outcomes.

news.headline: CNX Resources responds to final rules for Section 45V Hydrogen Production Tax Credit; Dept of Treasury's recognition noted.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, CNX Resources Corporation (NYSE: CNX) issued a statement in Pittsburgh regarding the final rules of the Inflation Reduction Act's Section 45V Hydrogen Production Tax Credit. The Department of Treasury's recent actions were acknowledged by CNX Resources Corporation in response to the regulation.

news.headline: Automakers end 2024 on a high note as E.V. demand rises. General Motors leads U.S. sales, increasing E.V. sales by over 100%.
news.summary: In the final quarter of the year, General Motors emerged as the top performer in U.S. sales by achieving a significant increase of 21%. Of note, the company saw a remarkable surge in its electric vehicle sales, more than doubling compared to previous periods.

news.headline: Fed's Kugler: There is a view the Fed can take time on future rate cuts.
Tandy Leather Factory names new CEO, Johan Hedberg, to replace Janet Carr; effective January 6.
news.summary: Fort Worth, Texas, on January 3, 2025 - Tandy Leather Factory, Inc. (Nasdaq: TLF) has named Johan Hedberg as its latest Chief Executive Officer and Board of Directors member, starting from Monday, January 6. The appointment of Mr. Hedberg follows the tenure of Janet Carr, who will continue to support the Company during the transition period until March 2025.

news.headline: Fed's Kugler: I am watching to see if inflation pressures will remain sticky.
Portland's new city councilors elect Elana Pirtle-Guiney as leader after 2-year government transition.
news.summary: In Oregon's Portland, on January 3, 2025, the newly elected officials made their debut at City Hall's council chambers for their inaugural meeting as the city's legislative body. This marked the launch of Portland's revamped government structure, with councilors choosing Elana Pirtle-Guiney as council member.

news.headline: LPOXY Therapeutics, Inc. buys assets from Xeno Biosciences to advance C. difficile prevention therapy.
news.summary: Platte City, MO - On January 3, 2025, LPOXY Therapeutics, Inc. revealed plans to acquire specific assets from Xeno Biosciences, marking a significant step for the clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company dedicated to pioneering treatments for infectious diseases. The agreement comes in the form of a term sheet and demonstrates LPOXY's commitment to expanding its portfolio. This strategic move aims to bolster LPOXY's capabilities in infectious disease prevention.

news.headline: IAS announces CFO transition, Jill Putman appointed interim CFO as Tania Secor departs. Jan. 3, 2025. ($IAS)
news.summary: In New York on January 3, 2025, Integral Ad Science (Nasdaq: IAS), a prominent global media measurement and optimization platform, revealed that Jill Putman has been named as the Interim CFO following the departure of Tania Secor. Putman also reaffirmed the company's Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 outlook.

news.headline: Syndax Pharmaceuticals granted inducement awards to purchase up to 123,100 shares on Jan 1, 2025.
news.summary: A biopharmaceutical company located in Waltham, Massachusetts, known as Syndax Pharmaceuticals, recently disclosed that they have awarded inducement grants for the acquisition of up to 123,100 shares on January 1, 2025. Specializing in the development of advanced cancer treatments, the company is listed on Nasdaq under the symbol SNDX.

news.headline: Insmed Incorporated (Nasdaq: INSM) announces inducement grants as per NASDAQ Rule 5635(c)(4) on Jan. 3, 2025.
news.summary: In Bridgewater, New Jersey on January 3, 2025, Insmed Incorporated, listed on Nasdaq as INSM, a leading global biopharmaceutical company focused on improving patient outcomes for serious illnesses, revealed the approval of an inducement.

news.headline: Wall Street rebounds after five-day slump, S&P 500 sectors gain, Nasdaq 100 leads charge, US Steel tumbles. Treasury yields hit 4.80%, oil settles at $73.82 per barrel.
news.summary: Stocks on Wall Street bounced back strongly on Friday, possibly ending a recent five-day decline, which was the lengthiest since April. Investors reentered the market with newfound confidence, causing major indices to all trend upwards, led by the Nasdaq 100. Each of the S&P 500 sectors saw gains, showcasing widespread market strength. The ISM Manufacturing PMI for December surpassed expectations, indicating a healthier manufacturing sector for the second consecutive month. Treasury yields also rose, with the 30-year yield climbing to 4.80%. Richmond Fed President Thomas Barkin hinted at a more hawkish approach in his speech, emphasizing the importance of maintaining tight monetary policy to combat inflation risks. Oil prices rose by over 1% to settle at $73.82 per barrel, extending their streak of six consecutive days of increases. Contrastingly, natural gas prices dropped by almost 8%.

news.headline: Stocks in the US surged on Friday, with S&P 500 recording a weekly loss despite the gains.
Fed's Kugler: Productivity growth and labor supply have helped us.
PennantPark Investment Corp. announces $0.08/share monthly distribution, payable on Feb. 3, to shareholders of record Jan. 15.
news.summary: Miami, January 3, 2025 - PennantPark Investment Corporation (NYSE: PNNT) has announced a monthly distribution of $0.08 per share for January 2025. The payment is set to be made on February 3, 2025, to stockholders recorded as of January 15, 2025. This distribution is anticipated to derive from taxable net investment income. Further details regarding the tax attributes of the distribution will be disclosed to stockholders via Form 1099 post the calendar year's conclusion and in the Company's routine submission to the Securities and Exchange Commission.

news.headline: Fed's Kugler: The current unemployment rate remains historically low.
